creator: 3d@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just spotted a problem with the CVS web interface service from
http://www.freebsd.org  and (of course) filed a PR.

But where should such a bug report go?

Fix: 

as the cvs collection is "www" I would suggest a "www" category for
the GNATS bug tracking system as well.
How-To-Repeat: file PR :)
